close_reason: Implemented with TDD: 20 new tests for new_empty, insert_log, remove_log, put_log_service, delete_log_service, set_replication_factor
description:
Add methods to RoutingData for dynamic population from metadata.

## Changes to routing_data.ex

### New field: log_services

```elixir
defstruct [:shard_table, :log_map, :log_services, :replication_factor]
```

### new_empty/0

Creates empty routing data:
```elixir
def new_empty do
  table = :ets.new(:shard_keys, [:ordered_set, :public])
  %__MODULE__{
    shard_table: table,
    log_map: %{},
    log_services: %{},
    replication_factor: 1
  }
end
```

### insert_log/2

Adds log to log_map at next available index:
```elixir
def insert_log(%__MODULE__{log_map: log_map} = rd, log_id) do
  next_index = map_size(log_map)
  %{rd | log_map: Map.put(log_map, next_index, log_id)}
end
```

### remove_log/2

Removes log and reindexes:
```elixir
def remove_log(%__MODULE__{log_map: log_map} = rd, log_id) do
  new_map = log_map
    |> Enum.reject(fn {_k, v} -> v == log_id end)
    |> Enum.sort_by(&elem(&1, 0))
    |> Enum.with_index()
    |> Map.new(fn {{_old_idx, id}, new_idx} -> {new_idx, id} end)
  %{rd | log_map: new_map}
end
```

### put_log_service/3 and delete_log_service/2

```elixir
def put_log_service(%__MODULE__{} = rd, log_id, service_ref) do
  %{rd | log_services: Map.put(rd.log_services, log_id, service_ref)}
end

def delete_log_service(%__MODULE__{} = rd, log_id) do
  %{rd | log_services: Map.delete(rd.log_services, log_id)}
end
```

### set_replication_factor/2

```elixir
def set_replication_factor(%__MODULE__{} = rd, factor) do
  %{rd | replication_factor: factor}
end
```

## Testing

- new_empty/0 creates valid empty struct with all fields
- insert_log/2 assigns sequential indices
- remove_log/2 removes and reindexes
- put_log_service/3 and delete_log_service/2 manage services map
- set_replication_factor/2 updates factor
title: RoutingData: Add new_empty/0, insert_log/2, remove_log/2
